channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former DPWH Secretary Manuel Bonoan placed under custody and hospital care after surrendering over Sandiganbayan warrant
item.description: Former Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) Secretary Manuel Bonoan was taken to the Philippine National Police (PNP) General Hospital after voluntarily surrendering to authorities on Monday...

item.title: Hudson Williams celebrates record-breaking Canadian Screen Awards success for Heated Rivalry
item.description: Actor Hudson Williams expressed appreciation and excitement after the production Heated Rivalry achieved a historic milestone at the Canadian Screen Awards. According to the report, the project set a ...

item.title: Tanzania U-17 talent Dismas Athanasi shines as team reaches historic AFCON final against Senegal
item.description: Dismas Shida Athanasi, only 14 years old, has become one of the biggest highlights of the TotalEnergies CAF Under-17 Africa Cup of Nations held in Morocco 2026. He is the youngest player in the tourna...

item.title: EU Reaffirms Pakistan as Key Regional Partner During High-Level Strategic Dialogue in Islamabad
item.description: The European Union’s top foreign policy chief, Kaja Kallas, has described Pakistan as a major regional power and an important partner of the EU during the 8th EU-Pakistan Strategic Dialogue held in Is...

item.title: Laurie Daley focuses on State of Origin II despite contract uncertainty
item.description: NSW Blues coach Laurie Daley has steered clear of discussing his future ahead of State of Origin II, keeping the focus firmly on preparing his team for a potential series-clinching match. Following a ...

item.title: Tanzania Approves Key Frameworks to Launch Vision 2050
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania is officially ready to start implementing Vision 2050 from July 1st, 2026. The National Planning Commission, chaired by President Samia Suluhu Hassan, has approved four major ...

item.title: Brisbane property prices continue rising as market momentum slows amid supply shortages and affordability pressures
item.description: Brisbane’s housing market continued to record price growth in May 2026, even as signs emerged that buyer activity is beginning to slow. According to property research firm Cotality, the city’s median ...

item.title: African countries and partners mobilise nearly $500 million to contain major Ebola outbreak and strengthen regional health security
item.description: African governments, together with international partners, have pledged almost $500 million in funding to respond to a rapidly expanding Ebola outbreak caused by the Bundibugyo strain. According to th...

item.title: IHC Hearing of Imaan and Hadi’s Sentence Suspension Pleas Postponed Due to Prosecutors’ Absence
item.description: On Monday, the Islamabad High Court (IHC) again adjourned the hearing regarding the sentence suspension petitions of Imaan Zainab Mazari-Hazir and Hadi Ali Chattha, despite a clear Supreme Court direc...

item.title: Emmanuel Wanyonyi Bags $6,000 After Second Place at Rabat Diamond League
item.description: At the Rabat Diamond League in Morocco, Emmanuel Wanyonyi finished second in the men's 800m on Sunday, May 31, despite entering the race as the favourite. Max Burgin of Britain took first place with a...

item.title: Portable Says Nigerian Celebrities Fear Speaking Against Insecurity Due to Possible Government Reprisals
item.description: Popular Nigerian singer Habeeb Okikiola Badmus, better known as Portable, has reacted to calls for Nigerian celebrities to publicly speak against the country’s worsening insecurity and economic hardsh...

item.title: Ali Velshi Expresses Concern Over America’s 250th Anniversary and Ongoing Racial and Democratic Issues
item.description: MS NOW anchor Ali Velshi shared a critical reflection on the upcoming 250th anniversary of the United States, expressing discomfort with how the milestone is being celebrated. Speaking on his program,...

item.title: Donny Pangilinan and Belle Mariano bid farewell as a love team in ‘Tayo sa Wakas’ exploring love, ambition, and growth
item.description: The film ‘Tayo sa Wakas’ marks the final on-screen collaboration of Filipino actors Donny Pangilinan and Belle Mariano, popularly known as the love team DonBelle. The project serves as both a farewell...

item.title: Uasin Gishu Woman Returns Home Safely After Being Detained in Lebanon
item.description: Vicoty Cheruto, a young woman from Uasin Gishu County, finally returned home after a long period of worry and uncertainty for her family. She had gone to Beirut, Lebanon, in November 2023 to work as a...

item.title: Former Oldham council leader warns of rising division and political fragmentation in Greater Manchester
item.description: Arooj Shah, the former leader of Oldham council in Greater Manchester, has warned that increasing polarisation and identity-based politics are damaging community cohesion in the town and beyond. Speak...

item.title: Carry1st Africa Cup 2026 set to become Africa’s largest Call of Duty: Mobile esports tournament with Lagos finals
item.description: Carry1st and Call of Duty: Mobile don officially announce the Carry1st Africa Cup 2026, wey go be the biggest Call of Duty: Mobile esports tournament across Africa. The competition go serve as the off...

item.title: Malacañang praises Jinggoy Estrada’s voluntary surrender amid plunder warrant; contrasts with Bato dela Rosa situation
item.description: Malacañang has expressed approval of Senator Jinggoy Estrada’s voluntary surrender to authorities following the issuance of a warrant of arrest by the Sandiganbayan in connection with plunder and graf...

item.title: St Kilda’s 2026 AFL season: performance analysis shows mixed results despite major recruiting drive
item.description: St Kilda’s 2026 AFL campaign is under scrutiny following an aggressive off-season recruiting spree aimed at pushing the club into finals contention. Despite high-profile acquisitions including Tom De ...

item.title: President Ruto, First Lady Rachel and Family Attend Historic Madaraka Day Celebrations in Wajir
item.description: President William Ruto, together with First Lady Rachel Ruto, attended the 63rd Madaraka Day celebrations held on Monday, 1 June 2026, at the newly upgraded 10,000-seater Wajir Stadium in Wajir County...

item.title: Angeles City building collapse: 12th fatality confirmed as rescue operations continue
item.description: Rescue operations in Angeles City, Pampanga continued after the collapse of a nine-storey building under construction, with authorities confirming that the death toll has risen to 12 following the rec...
